title: Make automation and subitems
excerpt: In my Make automation I am trying to create a subitem. I am unable to map column ID for the automation, unless there is already a subitem, and than I cannot dictate the value.

posts.author: asafm (Asaf)
posts.cookedHtml: In my Make automation I am trying to create a subitem. I am unable to map column ID for the automation, unless there is already a subitem, and than I cannot dictate the value.

posts.author: asafm (Asaf)
posts.cookedHtml: Screenshot 2023-11-06 at 17.10.571082×1072 61.1 KB

posts.author: aquibk (Aquib Zafar)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @asafm ,

Before creating a subitem through automation, You need to define the structure (columns) of the subitem by creating one default subitem.
